Meet Natasha

Natasha founded HEWMANN to bridge the gap between families and the support systems that are supposed to serve them. As both a certified advocate and a parent of a neurodivergent child, she brings deep personal understanding to every family she works with.

Her approach combines evidence-based strategies with genuine compassion, ensuring that every child's unique strengt
